dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Start by defining your Characters and Backgrounds. Then head over to the Story Workbench to split your script into segments and generate video clips.
dashboard.step1Desc: Define character appearance, personality and background for automatic story segment matching.
dashboard.step2Desc: Define environment prompts and reference images for story scenes.
dashboard.step3Desc: Input your script, AI splits it into segments, select backgrounds and generate videos.
dashboard.step4Desc: Set up MiniMax API Key for real video generation. Uses mock mode if not configured.
dashboard.noStories: No stories yet. Create one in the workbench!

character.title: Character Management
character.subtitle: Define actors for your video segments
character.nameLabel: Character Name (Used to match in story text)
character.appearancePlaceholder: A tall man with dark hair...
character.backgroundPlaceholder: e.g. Grew up in old town, former police officer...
character.uploadTooLarge: Image size must be 5MB or less.
character.uploadReadFailed: Failed to read image. Please try again.
character.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this character?

background.title: Background Management
background.subtitle: Create stunning environments for your stories
background.uploadTooLarge: Image size must be 5MB or less.
background.uploadReadFailed: Failed to read image. Please try again.
background.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this background?

workbench.confirmReSplit: Re-splitting will delete existing segments and video tasks. Continue?
workbench.noStoriesHint: No stories yet — enter a title and content above to get started
workbench.selectStory: Select a story to view its segments.
workbench.noSegments: No segments found for this story.
workbench.noVideoStats: No video tasks yet — go to Workbench to create a story and generate videos
workbench.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this story? All segments and video tasks will also be deleted.
workbench.batchNoEligible: No eligible segments for generation (need background set and not in-progress)
workbench.noCharactersWarning: No characters created yet. Segments won't auto-match characters.
workbench.noBackgroundsWarning: No backgrounds created yet. Cannot generate videos.
workbench.breakdownTip: "Breakdown" automatically extracts characters, backgrounds and segments from the story and links them together, preventing character confusion.
workbench.confirmReBreakdown: Re-breakdown will delete existing segments and video tasks, and re-extract characters and backgrounds. Continue?
workbench.breakdownSaved: Auto-saved to character and background libraries. Edit details on their respective pages.
workbench.breakdownApplied: Breakdown applied — characters and backgrounds saved
workbench.breakdownEditHint: Edit or remove unwanted characters and backgrounds. On apply, they will be saved to libraries. Existing same-name entities will not be overwritten.
workbench.editResetToDraft: Story content modified — status reset to Draft, please re-split

space.title: Story Space Management
space.subtitle: Manage your creative spaces, group characters, backgrounds and stories
space.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this space...
space.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this space? All characters, backgrounds and stories in this space will also be deleted.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure API tokens and platform integrations
settings.minimaxDesc: Configure your MiniMax API credentials to enable real video generation. Leave empty to use mock mode.
settings.mockHint: No API key set — video generation will use simulated responses.
settings.liveHint: API key configured — video generation will call the real MiniMax API.
settings.getTokenLink: Get your API key from MiniMax Platform →
